title: Meri Biwi Ka Jawab Nahin
subTitle: Durga, a village girl and the wife of Inspector Ajay, fights against the injustices that women are subjected to. She fights for the truth and encounters many obstacles in the process.

title: Tejasvini
subTitle: Lala Khurana, a mafia leader, tries to quash the charges of molestation against his son and make him the CM. However, ASP Tejasvini is hell-bent on ending their tyranny and getting them convicted.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Na Tum Jaano Na Hum
subTitle: Esha and Rahul begin to fall in love while exchanging letters with each other. Her parents, though, would like her to marry Akshay, who happens to be Rahul's friend.

title: Maharaja
subTitle: Prince Kohinoor returns home after twenty years only to discover that Ranbir Singh, his parents' killer, still holds control. Subsequently, he decides to defeat him to protect his loved ones.

title: Ishq Hai Tumse
subTitle: Arjun, a Hindu, falls in love with Khushboo, a Muslim. However, he is unable to profess his feelings for her due to his family's opposition to her religion.

title: Veergati
subTitle: Ajay finds it difficult to work in a corrupt society. Hence, he begins to gamble and soon finds himself helping the prostitutes who are exploited by Ekka Seth.

title: Aulad
subTitle: Believing his wife to be dead, Anand gives up his own child to Yashoda, who has lost her husband and her baby. However, he faces a dilemma when his wife returns.

title: Taqdeerwala
subTitle: Yamraj and Chitragupta descend to Earth to look for the missing book of destiny. Soon, they find it in the possession of a man who refuses to part with it because it contains information of his mother's lifespan.

title: Aag
subTitle: A young man seeks a fresh start in a village after enduring tragedy, only to find himself entangled in a conflict that tests his strength and sense of justice.

title: Aag
subTitle: A young man seeks a fresh start in a village after enduring tragedy, only to find himself entangled in a conflict that tests his strength and sense of justice.

title: Satya
subTitle: Satya, a young man, works for Tabrez Ansari, a gangster. Later, he falls in love with Sapna, a beautiful woman, and his enemies plan to use his weakness to their advantage.

title: Khanjar
subTitle: Kumar, discovers his wife's infidelity and sends her away with their illegitimate son. Years later, the son returns to Simla, unaware of a serial killer's presence and his family's dark past.

title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
subTitle: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Hum Aapke Dil Mein Rehte Hain
subTitle: Love begins with a marriage of convenience and stays with Megha and Vijay in the throes of separation. In a classic case of unfortunate timing, one realises it too soon, while the other is too late.

title: Paap Ki Duniya
subTitle: Suraj, a criminal, and Vijay, a policeman, vie for each other's blood, unaware that they are brothers. Things turn more complicated when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Mr. Azaad
subTitle: Azaad, an orphan, takes to petty crime and acts like a modern-day Robin Hood. However, the death of an honest constable causes him to take stock of his actions.

title: Commando
subTitle: A disavowed commando escapes captivity after a year of torture at the hands of the chinese. On his way back to India, he is roped into protecting a woman from a local goon that wants to marry her.

title: Commando
subTitle: A disavowed commando escapes captivity after a year of torture at the hands of the chinese. On his way back to India, he is roped into protecting a woman from a local goon that wants to marry her.

title: Meri Biwi Ka Jawab Nahin
subTitle: Durga, a village girl and the wife of Inspector Ajay, fights against the injustices that women are subjected to. She fights for the truth and encounters many obstacles in the process.

title: Tan- Badan
subTitle: A spoilt young man wants to marry the girl of his dreams, but instead he has to marry an innocent village girl who knows nothing of the intimate relationship between a husband and wife.

title: Aan Milo Sajna
subTitle: Savitri, a wealthy widow, refuses to leave any inheritance to Anil, her self-centred son. So, he hires a woman to pretend to be his wife in order to please his mother.

title: Patthar Ke Sanam
subTitle: Meena and Taruna tease their new manager Rajesh, but both fall for him. An attack on Rajesh brings his mother to town, which reveals a dark past and leads to tragedy.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Seeta Aur Geeta
subTitle: Identical twins who were separated at birth, lead different lives, wherein one is abused by her aunt, the other turns out to be street smart. However, things take a turn when they reconnect and decide to swap places.

title: Maqsad
subTitle: Rajeshwar is the only son of a wealthy industrialist, while Tilak hails from a poor family. When Rajeshwar's father is murdered and the blame falls on Tilak, he must strive to prove his innocence.

title: Shaan
subTitle: After their cop brother dies at the hands of a ruthless gangster, Vijay and Ravi are determined to find the gangster and take their revenge.
